title: Section Divider
description: Visual break between major topic groups — large title centered on the slide

sections.title: Section name — short (2-5 words), describes the upcoming group of slides
sections.subtitle: Optional context line below the section title

qualityRules: Use section dividers between major topic shifts, not between every slide
Title should be short and descriptive — section name, not a full sentence
Typical deck has 2-4 section dividers for 10-15 slides
Visual style: large centered text, minimal decoration
All text uses Roboto font family, DS Kit tokens for colors
